description_long: This is a whimsical, turquoise stuffed toy creature with a rounded, plump body and a textured, speckled surface. It features two large, white horns on its head, big round eyes, and a wide mouth with small, evenly spaced teeth. Along its back, a row of small, white, conical spikes runs from the top of its head to the tip of its tail. The toy has short, stubby arms and legs, and a long, tapering tail that curves slightly upward. Its overall appearance is playful and friendly, making it appealing to children and suitable for urban play areas or as a decorative plush in public spaces.
description: A turquoise, speckled stuffed toy creature with horns, a row of back spikes, big eyes, and a wide, toothy mouth. Its plump body, short limbs, and long tail give it a playful and friendly look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the creature's large eyes, wide mouth with visible teeth, and both horns prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the horn, the protruding eye, and the row of back spikes leading to the tail.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the full line of white spikes running from head to tail and the broad, rounded back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other horn, eye, and the continuation of the back spikes and tail.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon monster with horns and spikes
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and slightly goofy, with wide, open eyes and a broad mouth displaying small, evenly spaced teeth. The lack of eyebrows and the open mouth give it a friendly, inviting look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting with its legs spread out and arms slightly forward, the head upright and tail extended behind.
